title: Promote dynamic-types spec and export FFI traceability

source.subject: feat(v0.3): bump compiler, promote dynamic-types spec, export FFI traceability

body:
Superrepo commit promotes dynamic-types platform-spec material and ties export FFI traceability to the integrated compiler tip.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`8cffb33`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/8cffb33)
- **Subject:** feat(v0.3): bump compiler, promote dynamic-types spec, export FFI traceability
- **Completed:** 2026-05-24

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Workstream:** `ffi-export`

## Relation
Lands in the v0.3 cutoff window (`f57377a`→`aaddd32`) under workstream `ffi-export`.
